{{Infobox artifact
| name = Scythe of Ozriel
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Scythe of Ozriel]] is unique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Scythe of Ozriel]] is a weapon that looks like a slice of darkness forged into metal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Scythe of Ozriel]] was used to half-erase [[the Mad King]]'s body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
